description: A full CMDB configuration item record. Fields vary by CI class but common attributes are included below.
name: CmdbInstance

sys_id.description: Unique identifier for the configuration item.

name.description: The display name of the configuration item.

sys_class_name.description: The CMDB class name for this CI.

operational_status.description: The operational status of the CI.

install_status.description: The installation status of the CI.

serial_number.description: The serial number of the hardware asset.

ip_address.description: The IP address of the CI.

mac_address.description: The MAC address of the CI.

dns_domain.description: The DNS domain of the CI.

location.description: The sys_id of the CI location.

company.description: The sys_id of the owning company.

assigned_to.description: The sys_id of the assigned user.

managed_by.description: The sys_id of the managing user.

support_group.description: The sys_id of the support group.

sys_created_on.description: The date and time when the CI was created.

sys_updated_on.description: The date and time when the CI was last updated.
